problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Combining Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
